boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: AUTH-ZEN-080 exactly matches site, protocol, consent, date, and enrollment authority
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect; FEAS-ZEN-080 is planning only

final_answer: Action may proceed. AUTH-ZEN-080 supplies exact activation authority matching site Z-12, protocol P7.2, consent C11, date 2026-06-28, and enrollment authority. FEAS-ZEN-080 is limited to planning. Boundary is closed per policy STD-ZEN-080-P.
